title: dampiera altissima
intro: Dampiera altissima, also known as the tall dampiera, is a flowering plant native to Western Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are thought to be due to the presence of certain bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Dampiera altissima include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Dampiera altissima can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Western Australian medicine.
